query: What does Class I diagnostic and preventive services cost me?
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Class I - Diagnostic and Preventive Services | Routine oral examinations | Covered in full (0% coinsurance, no deductible) | Benefits based on allowed amount | are limited to two per calendar year. Initial consultations, second opinion consultations and office visits count toward the limit for oral examinations. |
| Class I - Diagnostic and Preventive Services | Problem focused (including emergency) oral evaluations and re-evaluations | Covered in full (0% coinsurance, no deductible) | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class I - Diagnostic and Preventive Services | Prophylaxis (cleaning, scaling, and polishing of teeth) | Covered in full (0% coinsurance, no deductible) | Benefits based on allowed amount | is limited to 2 per calendar year |
